info.title: Ecomapp-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp-buildTime is an e-commerce platform API that facilitates product management, order processing, and customer interactions.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product listings, including creation, retrieval, update, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Manage customer orders, track status, and process payments.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Handle customer information, authentication, and profiles.

post.description: Add an item to the shopping cart for the specified user. The request body must contain the details of the item to be added. On success, returns the updated cart state.

requestBody.description: Represents the item to add to the user's cart

200.description: Item successfully added to the cart

400.description: Bad Request - invalid input or missing required fields

example.message: The item details provided are invalid or incomplete.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetch the list of items currently present in the shopping cart for the specified user. Returns the cart contents and their details.

400.description: Bad Request - invalid userId or malformed request

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Allows a user identified by userId to place a new order by submitting order details. Returns the order confirmation and details upon success.

requestBody.description: Order data including items and payment details to place a new order

items.description: List of items included in the order

shippingAddress.description: Shipping address for the order delivery

example.message: The order data provided is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: At least one item must be specified with valid productId and quantity > 0

example.message: No user found with the specified userId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed information about an order identified by the orderId parameter, including status, items, and payment details.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: Order ID format is not valid

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: This operation initiates a payment with all required details provided in the request body. It returns a payment response which includes status and transaction identifiers. Use this endpoint to start payment processing for an order or service.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation details including amount, currency, payer info, and payment method

200.description: Payment successfully initiated and processing started

example.message: The provided payment details are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Payment method is not supported or missing.

402.description: Payment required or payment failed due to insufficient funds

example.message: Payment failed due to insufficient funds or payment rejection.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while initiating payment

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive payment notifications from payment gateways
post.description: This endpoint receives asynchronous payment status notifications (webhooks) from payment gateways or processors. It processes status updates and triggers relevant business logic such as order status updates or payment confirmations.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload containing payment transaction status and metadata

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or signature verification failed

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment failed or declined notification received

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment processor.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing webhook

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog with all required details. The request body must include the product's name, description, price, and other relevant attributes. On success, the newly added product information is returned.

requestBody.description: The product object that needs to be added to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

200.description: Product successfully added to the catalog

example.message: One or more fields have invalid values or are missing

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product conflict due to duplicate SKU or name

example.message: A product with the given SKU or name already exists

details.issue: SKU must be unique and this SKU is already in use

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the shipping tracking status for an order
get.description: Returns the current shipping and delivery status of the order identified by orderId. Provides tracking information including carrier, status updates, expected delivery date, and history of tracking events.

200.description: Current tracking information for the given order

404.description: Order not found or tracking information unavailable

example.message: No shipping information found for orderId 'ord-7b3d8f2a'

details.issue: OrderId does not exist or no tracking data available

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Create a new user account by providing the required user information in the request body. On success, returns the created user's details.

200.description: Successfully registered a new user account.

400.description: Bad request. The input data is invalid or incomplete.

example.message: User registration data is missing required fields or contains invalid values.

details.issue: Email address is required and must be valid.

409.description: Conflict. A user with the provided email or username already exists.

example.message: A user with the given email or username already exists.

details.issue: The email address is already registered.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred during user registration.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code used for the pricing of the item

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this item

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount

price.description: Original price of a single unit of the item

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart

currency.description: Currency code for the entire cart

items.description: List of items present in the cart

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after applying discounts

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices for all items in the cart

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied across all items

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

userId.description: Identifier for the user owning this cart

discount.description: Discount applied to the order item

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for the item

price.description: Original price of the item before discount

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

currency.description: Currency code for the order pricing

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Amount to be paid after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Status of payment for the order

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order

orderId.description: Identifier of the order being paid

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway to handle the payment

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

currency.description: Currency code used in the payment

orderId.description: Identifier of the order related to this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

paymentId.description: Identifier of the payment related to this webhook event

status.description: Updated status of the payment from the webhook notification

transactionId.description: Transaction ID associated with the payment

available.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase

category.description: Category under which the product is listed

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

description.example: Wireless Bluetooth headphones with noise cancellation

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: A high-quality wireless headset with noise cancellation.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Quantity of product units currently in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the shipment

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format

lastUpdated.description: Date-time when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the user account was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the user account was last updated

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the error request

errorCode.description: Specific error code for client error

field.description: The field that caused the validation issue

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the error request
